---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Data Aggregator
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## Problem Statement
Describe the problem that this feature would solve. For example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you envision this feature working. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.

## User Impact
How would this feature benefit users of Data Aggregator?

## Implementation Ideas (Optional)
If you have ideas about how to implement this feature, especially if you're considering contributing it yourself, please share them here.
